visual_description:
A medium close-up shot focuses on a young man with dark, messy hair and round glasses. He wears a dark jacket over a lighter shirt. He looks slightly off-camera with a concerned and intense expression. The setting is a very dark, cluttered room, with the background out of focus, showing indistinct shapes of furniture and objects. To the left, a tall, glass hurricane lamp is partially visible. White Chinese characters appear at the bottom of the screen, and a watermark is visible in the top right corner. The audio opens with a young man speaking in a low, serious, and slightly tense voice, stating, "But you didn't say anything." His tone is one of quiet accusation and disappointment. The background is filled with a low, ominous, and suspenseful ambient sound, creating a feeling of unease and anticipation.

The scene cuts to a close-up of a different young man with platinum blonde hair and a pale complexion. He is wearing a dark, high-collared shirt. He stares forward with a look of fear and apprehension. To his left, another young man with dark hair looks on with a serious expression. The background remains dark and indistinct. White Chinese characters appear at the bottom of the frame, and the same watermark is
